title: Tender Toasted Kenyan Oat Onigiri
description: A rich and indulgent Kenyan dish featuring ground oats and shaped like nigiri, this lacto-vegetarian friendly recipe is cooked to perfection in a donabe vessel.
instructions: Preheat the donabe vessel over medium heat.
In a large bowl, mix together the ground oats, water, and vegetable oil to form a dough.
Add the chopped onion, grated carrot, and chopped green pepper to the dough and mix well.
Season the dough with salt and black pepper to taste.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a triangle.
Place the shaped dough into the preheated donabe vessel and cook for 10 minutes on each side.
Brush the tops of the onigiri with milk and continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the onigiri from the donabe vessel and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the tender toasted Kenyan oat onigiri warm and enjoy.
